Speaker 1: Hello? Hello?
honey:  I LOVE MY NEW JOB!
Speaker 1: Honey, you're screaming.
honey: YOU BET YOUR ASS I AM! I just had the best first day ever! The kitchen: twice as big as Allessandro's.
Speaker 1: Oh, that's great.
honey: Yeah, a-a-and clean. Not just health department clean... Monica clean.
Speaker 1: Awesome.
honey: Oh, and the people are so nice. There's this one guy, Geoffrey, he's the Maitre D., Chandler, you will love him. He is without a doubt, the funniest guy I have ever met.
